prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "1A. Risk Factors" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 1C. Cybersecurity".
First locate the bottom edge of Item 1A's text:
- If the "Item 1C" heading is visible on this page, Item 1A ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Otherwise Item 1A runs all the way to the very bottom of the page.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 1A at that bottom edge — the FINAL lines right before the section ends, NOT lines from the top or middle of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
projections by inexperienced sales persons; (iv) excessive and undisclosed bid-ask differentials and markups by selling broker-dealers; and (v) the
wholesale dumping of the same securities by promoters and broker-dealers after prices have been manipulated to a desired level, resulting in investor
losses. Our management is aware of the abuses that have occurred historically in the penny stock market. Although we do not expect to be in a
position to dictate the behavior of the market or of broker-dealers who participate in the market, management will strive within the confines of
practical limitations to prevent the described patterns from being established with respect to our securities.
